gate: visual-frame-audit (gate-1, Workflow wf_91940030-4e1, 19 content scenes, refute-by-default)

blocking_fixed.issue: result.reason 內聯數學 $\tfrac{1}{\cos x}$ 渲成亂碼（derivation 的 result.reason 是大寫 mono 標籤欄、不渲染數學）
blocking_fixed.fix: 改成純文字標籤「secant, same rule」→ 重渲複核：亂碼消失、六導數數學全正確

cosθ 指定 dashed:true 但渲成實線

notes.why_trig_is_different: Clean definition slide: cyan kicker, bold white title with navy spine, prose statement, clear vertical flow from the sin difference quotient to the amber sinθ/θ limit with its (0/0) tag — strong hierarchy, generous margins.
notes.difference_quotient_for_sine: Clean three-row derivation: [EXAMPLE] eyebrow, two equations with dashed leaders to reason labels, amber-highlighted result row. Strong logic-flow top-to-bottom; all Tex legible.
notes.sector_inequality: Clean, well-balanced unit-circle squeeze figure: nested inner triangle (teal), sector wedge (orange), outer-triangle height AC (green) color-coded to the ½sinθ ≤ ½θ ≤ ½tanθ chain; geometry faithful (B on circle and radius OC, A=(1,0), C above A).
notes.squeeze_to_the_bound: Clean derivation: four left-aligned inequality rows with dashed leaders to reasons, orange highlight on the key result line; Tex legible.
notes.continuity_of_sin_cos: Clean theorem_proof: [PROPOSITION] eyebrow, accent-bordered statement box, two proof lines, green QED marker. Tex matches storyboard verbatim; good vertical rhythm.
notes.fundamental_limit: Clean theorem-proof: boxed statement, two-step proof with cyan bullets, green QED with tombstone glyph; navy-spine left margin, no crowding.
notes.squeeze_graph: Clean squeeze diagram: orange ratio trapped between cyan y=1 ceiling and muted cosθ floor, converging on the hollow open circle at (0,1).
notes.limit_not_identity: Clean CAUTION callout: navy card with orange spine + warning icon; body and all math (θ→0, sinθ/θ, π/2, 2/π≈0.64, θ=π) render crisply.
notes.radians_essential: Clean CAUTION callout: red accent bar + icon; three teaching equations (degree limit = π/180, dragged derivative, clean radian sin'=cos) in clear top-to-bottom flow.
notes.derivative_of_sine: Clean theorem-proof card: boxed statement, two bulleted proof steps, green QED line; left-aligned, strong hierarchy and Tex legibility.
notes.derivative_of_cosine: Clean theorem-proof: accent-bar title with THEOREM badge, boxed statement, spaced PROOF list ending in green QED; Tex legible, comfortable margin.
notes.slope_equals_height: Clean layout: orange sin vs gray cos read clearly, three green tangents (m=1,0,-1) align with the orange cos-height dots (1,0,-1); labels well-separated, no collisions. (Nit: cos dashing spec-vs-render mismatch, non-blocking.)
notes.derivative_cycle: Clean definition_math: clear hierarchy (eyebrow / title / statement / two amber equations); cycle chain and d⁴/dx⁴ identity render crisply, match storyboard.
notes.companion_limit: Clean three-row derivation: left-aligned equations with dashed leaders to reasons, amber accent on the final limit result; strong hierarchy, uncrowded.
notes.all_six_trig_derivatives: Clean derivation: consistent left-aligned math rows with dashed leaders to reasons; highlighted gold sec-result row. (Garbled reason fixed → now reads SECANT, SAME RULE.)
notes.shm_compute: Clean derivation: four equation rows with dashed leaders, SHM result row highlighted amber to mark the punchline; strong hierarchy, ample whitespace.
notes.shm_stacked_graphs: Clean three-row stack with color coding (orange sin / blue cos / green −sin), aligned baselines, shared dashed guides at t=π/2, 3π/2 tying peaks-to-zeros. (Mild left-band whitespace, within house style.)
notes.toward_the_chain_rule: Clean definition slide: [DEFINITION] eyebrow + title, two-line statement, one highlighted math row (sin x ✓, sin(x²)?, sin(3x+1)?). Forward-reference closing slide.
notes.recap: Clean recap card: navy spine + header, four numbered takeaways left, two boxed REMEMBER formulas right; all Tex crisp, good hierarchy.
